heading: Omitted

notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to negotiating teams for the Navajo and Hopi Tribes and negotations between the tribes, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 93–531, § 288 Stat. 1712Dec. 22, 1974
